name: rune-weaver
description: 自然语言游戏功能编织引擎

scripts.cli:micro: tsx apps/cli/index.ts --input "做一个按Q键的冲刺技能" --type micro-feature --trigger Q
scripts.cli:system: tsx apps/cli/index.ts --input "做一个按F4触发的三选一天赋抽取系统" --type standalone-system --ui
scripts.verify:p0: npm run check-types && npm run test && npm run examples && npm run cli:micro
